title: KEPLIN 9 Inch Heavy Duty Folding Step Stool | Non-Slip Foldable Footstool for Toddlers, Children & Adults | Portable, Lightweight Plastic Footstep w/Carrying Handle for Indoor or Outdoor (Blue)
features: MULTI-PURPOSE: Our Keplin folding step stool is the perfect tool for helping children, toddlers, the elderly, or others with special needs to reach high places. Kids can use this foldable stool to reach the sink, toilet, or bath, or climb the bed. Our foot stool versatile enough for indoor or outdoor use, making it ideal as a garden stool or bathroom stool.

USER FRIENDLY: Folding stool for kids designed for daily use, this collapsible stool can be activated with just a flip of the hand. In addition to being lightweight and durable, our small fold-up stool is incredibly portable, making it convenient to move around your home or take on the go as a kids camping chair.

STRONG LOAD CAPACITY: Keplin’s heavy-duty plastic step stool supports up to 150kg, providing a reliable and safe step support for you whenever needed. This foldable step for adults and kids offers long-term support for dusting, tidying, or storing items in your office, shop, home, or garden.

SPACE-SAVING & PORTABLE: This small kitchen step stool is easy to fold away after use, making it simple to store in any corner of your house. The carry handles and lightweight design make it convenient to bring anywhere you need, functioning perfectly as a foldable stool for various tasks.

SLIP RESISTANT AND SAFE: The child step stool for bathroom safe and steady step stool features slip-resistant feet and a textured surface to ensure users have a firm stand with a good grip on the floor. Our bathroom stools designed with safety in mind, it’s perfect as a toddler step stool, kitchen step stool, or step stool for kids, keeping your family safe during use
